sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Elche have shown strong form in their last 5 matches, securing 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, including a dominant 4-0 victory over Rayo Vallecano. Villarreal, however, are struggling with 3 consecutive losses in their recent 5 games, conceding early goals and failing to keep clean sheets. This contrast in momentum gives Elche a slight edge at home.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, results have been split with Elche winning 3-1 at home in February 2023 and Villarreal dominating with a 4-0 victory in September 2022. Historical data suggests high-scoring games, with 4 of their last 5 meetings exceeding 2.5 goals.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Elche, sitting 9th with 22 points, boast a solid defense (6th fewest goals conceded) and high ball possession (3rd in the league), but struggle to create big chances (13th). Villarreal, 4th with 35 points, have a potent attack (31 goals scored) but recent defensive lapses and missing key players could hinder them. Their superior league standing still makes them favorites per Sofascore's 45% away win probability.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Elche’s Rafa Mir (6 goals) and in-form goalkeeper Iñaki Peña (8.18 avg. rating) will be crucial, though they miss forward André Silva. Villarreal rely on Alberto Moleiro (6 goals) and Nicolas Pépé, but injuries to players like Tajon Buchanan (5 goals) could impact their depth.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Elche’s ability to score early (first to score in 4/5 recent games) and Villarreal’s tendency to concede early (last 3 losses) suggest the hosts might take an early lead. However, Villarreal’s higher expected goals in recent games indicate they could exploit chances if Elche’s defense falters late.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Despite Elche’s home advantage and recent form, Villarreal’s overall quality and attacking potential tilt the balance slightly in their favor. Expect a competitive match with goals likely on both sides given head-to-head trends and current defensive vulnerabilities.
